info.title: Financial Institutions
info.description:
The Institutions service provides access to information about different financial institutions such as banks.

![JOF1](https://www.jopacc.com/sites/default/files/2023-12/jpc-internal-jof-banner.png)

---

**_This is the initial draft of the Jordan Open Finance specification_**

The services in this Open API specification are Direct-Call Services (DCS). These services can be accessed by direct calls to the banks or by using an aggregator central hub such as JoPACC. However, the URLs and routes for these services are designed for direct-calls only.

- For the Open API specification of the aggregated services, refer to the Aggregator Services specification.

Services in Jordan Open Finance Specification (JOF) are divided into 4 categories based on their content and nature of consent.

# **Facilities and Products Services (FPS)**

This category includes services that specifically provide data about the Financial 
Institution's facilities and products. It does not contain any information about the 
customers or require their consent.

The Financial Institution resource is one of the FPS services and it provides detailed information about different financial institutions.

### **Overview**

---

The **Financial Institution**  service provides access to information about different financial institutions such as banks, and the services they offer.
Additionally, this service provides various data fields, including the institution's name, address, and contact information, among other details.

#### **Financial Institution Services**

**1. Get a Financial institution's information**

### **Endpoint**

---

### **GET /institution**

#### **Get a Financial institution's information:** This service allows the retrieval of the details of a Financial Institution 

|     | Resource   | Method | EndPoint        |
| --- | --------   | ------ | --------------- |
| 1   | institution| GET    | /institution    |


### **Headers**

---

The table below lists the HTTP headers that can be included in requests to provide additional information or configuration.

|     | HeaderName            | Required/Optional | Description                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --- | --------------------- | ----------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | Authorization         | Required          | This header typically carries credentials, such as tokens or keys, allowing the server to authenticate the client's request and determine whether it has permission to access the requested resource. |
| 2   | x-interactions-id     | Required          | This header is not a standard HTTP header, but it is used as a unique id for the interaction, used in all requests and responses that are related                                                     |
| 3   | x-idempotency-key     | Required          | A unique identifier used to ensure idempotent API requests, preventing duplicate actions when the same request is made multiple times.                                                                |
| 4   | x-financial-id        | Optional          | A custom header potentially used in financial APIs to convey specific transaction or account identifiers.                                                                                             |
| 5   | x-jws-signature       | Required          | A custom header indicating the presence of a JSON Web Signature (JWS) for verifying the authenticity and integrity of API requests.                                                                   |


## **UML Diagrams**

---
![JOF1](https://www.jopacc.com/sites/default/files/2024-05/financial_institution_dcyi1f.png)


### **Data Dictionary**

---

The table below represents the API service fields and serves as a comprehensive reference detailing the meaning, format, and usage of each field, ensuring a consistent understanding of the service.


| #   | Field                     | Data Type                 | JSON Path                        | Description                                                    |
| --- | ------------------------- | ------------------------- | -------------------------------- | -----------------------------------------------------          |
| 1   | getInstitution            | N/A                       | N/A                              | Method to retrieve details of a Financial Institution          |
| 2   | institutionType           | enum                      | institutionType                  | Type of the institution                                        |
| 3   | institutionIdentification | object(complex type)      | institutionIdentification        | Identification details of the institution                      | 
| 4   | institutionInfo           | object                    | institutionInfo                  | Information about the institution                              |
| 5   | name                      | object(complex type)      | institutionInfo.name             | Name of the institution                                        |
| 6   | address                   | object(complex type)      | institutionInfo.address          | Address of the institution                                     |
| 7   | \_links                   | object                    | \_links                          | Contains Hyperlinks to related resources                       |
| 8   | self                      | object(complex type)      | \_links.self                     | Self-reference link                                            |
| 9   | branches                  | object(complex type)      | \_links.branches                 | Link to institution branches                                   |
| 10  | SSTs                      | object(complex type)      | \_links.SSTs                     | Link to institution SSTs                                       |
| 11  | offers                    | object(complex type)      | \_links.offers                   | Link to institution offers                                     |
| 12  | products                  | object(complex type)      | \_links.products                 | Link to institution products                                   |
| 13  | FXs                       | object(complex type)      | \_links.FXs                      | Link to institution foreign exchange services                  |
| 14  | fees                      | object(complex type)      | \_links.fees                     | Link to institution fees                                       |
| 15  | next                      | object(complex type)      | \_links.next                     | Link to next page                                              |
| 16  | prev                      | object(complex type)      | \_links.prev                     | Link to previous page                                          |
| 17  | last                      | object(complex type)      | \_links.last                     | Link to last page                                              |

### **Complex Types Dictionary**

---

The tables below represent a structured overview of composite data structures utilized within the API, detailing their constituent attributes and relationships.

#### **\_linksComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                               |
| --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type representing the related links information     |
| **Used in**     | **1.** \_links.\*                                             |
| **JSON Path**   | **1.** \_links.\*                                             |


##### **_\_linksComplexType in details_**
 
| \*  | **Field** | Data Type | **JSON Path**             | **Description**                                         |
| --- | --------- | --------- | ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | href      | string    | /\_links.\*.href          |  The hyperlink reference for a related service resource.|
| 2   | method    | string    | /\_links.\*.method        | The HTTP method for the associated href                 |


#
---

#### **addressComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                          |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type containing information about the address. |
| **Used in**     | institutionInfo                                          |
| **JSON Path**   | institutionInfo.address                                  |

#####

##### **_addressComplexType in details_**

| \*  | **Field**    | Data Type | **JSON Path**                                  | **Description**                          |
| --- | ------------ | --------- | ---------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| 1   | addresslines | array     | institutionInfo.address.addresslines           | The address lines of the institution     |
| 2   | city         | string    | institutionInfo.address.city                   | The city of the institution              |
| 3   | state        | string    | institutionInfo.adress.state                   | The state of the institution             |
| 4   | postcode     | string    | institutionInfo.adress.postcode                | The postcode of the institution          |
| 5   | phoneNumber  | string    | institutionInfo.adress.phoneNumber             | The phone number of the institution      |
| 6   | website      | string    | institutionInfo.adress.website                 | The website of the institution           |
| 7   | moreInfo     | string    | institutionInfo.adress.moreInfo                | Additional information about the branch. |
| 8   | countryInfo  | object    | institutionInfo.adress.countryInfo             | The country information of the branch.   |
| 8.1 | countryCode  | object    | institutionInfo.adress.countryInfo.countryCode | The country code of the branch.          |
| 8.2 | countryName  | object    | institutionInfo.adress.countryInfo.countryName | The country name of the branch.          |
| 9   | location     | object    | institutionInfo.adress.location                | The location of the branch.              |
| 9.1 | latitude     | number    | institutionInfo.adress.location.latitude       | The latitude of the branch.              |
| 9.2 | longitude    | number    | institutionInfo.adress.location.longitude      | The longitude of the branch.             |

#
---

#### **routeComplexType**

| Info.           |                                                         |
| --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Description** | A complex type representing the route information.      |
| **Used in**     | **1.** institutionIdentification                        |
| **JSON Path**   | **1.** institutionIdentification                        |


##### **_routeComplexType in details_**
 
| \*  | **Field** | Data Type | **JSON Path**                     | **Description**                           |
| --- | --------- | --------- | -------------------------         | ------------------------------------------|
| 1   | schema    | string    | institutionIdentification.schema  | The schema or structure of the route.     |
| 2   | address   | string    |institutionIdentification.address  | The address associated with the route.    |


#
---


#### **nameComplexType**
 
|  Info.                 |                                      |
|------------------------|--------------------------------------| 
| **Description**        | Specifies a complex type for name    |     
| **Used in**            | **1.** institutionInfo               |
| **JSON Path**          | **1.** institutionInfo.name          |  



##### **_nameComplexType in details_** 
| *  | **Field**       |  Data Type                | **JSON Path**                                                                      |   **Description**                                                        |
| ---|-----------------|---------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1  |enName           | string                    | institutionInfo.name.enName                                                        |Institution's English Name                                                |
| 2  |arName           | string                    | institutionInfo.name.arName                                                        |Institution's Arabic Name                                                 |
| 3  |tradeName        | object                    | institutionInfo.name.tradeName                                                     |Institution's trade or business name associated with a product or entity  |
| 3.1|enName           | string                    | institutionInfo.name.tradeName.enName                                              |Institution's English name of the trade or business.                      | 
| 3.2|arName           | string                    | institutionInfo.name.tradeName.arName                                              |Institution's  Arabic name of the trade or business.                      |
 
 
#
---



The Central Bank of Jordan has classified Open Finance consent into Account Information consent and Payment Initiation consent. The above categories are based on the CBJ's classifications and divide them further for the user's convenience.

Some useful links:

- [About JoPACC](https://jopacc.com)

get.description: retrieve details of a Financial Institution

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Authorization header in which the token is placed

parameters.name: x-interactions-id
parameters.description: Unique id for the interaction, used in all request and responses that are related

parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique id that is generated for each request and response. Used for tracking and to check for duplicate calls

parameters.name: x-financial-id
parameters.description: Unique id for the Financial Institution; BIC or Pseudo-BIC code of the sender

parameters.name: x-jws-signature
parameters.description: JWS Signature, refer to security reference

x-customer-ip-address.name: x-customer-ip-address
x-customer-ip-address.description: The User's IP address if the user is currently logged in with the TPP

x-financial-id.name: x-financial-id
x-financial-id.description: Unique id for the Financial Institution; BIC or Pseudo-BIC code of the sender

skip.name: skip
skip.description: The number of resources to skip showing in this response. Used for pagination

sort.name: sort
sort.description: Sorting the response by creation date of the resources (ascending or descending)

accountSchema.name: accountSchema
accountSchema.description: Schema of the account address of the user. Defined as 'accountId' if using accountId, or 'IBAN' in case of using Iban ..etc

Authorization.name: Authorization
Authorization.description: Authorization header in which the token is placed

x-customer-user-agent.name: x-customer-user-agent
x-customer-user-agent.description: Indicates the user-agent the User is using. Helps protecting from comprimised devices

x-jws-signature.name: x-jws-signature
x-jws-signature.description: JWS Signature, refer to security reference

x-auth-date.name: x-auth-date
x-auth-date.description: Date and time of the last authentication of the User by the TPP

limit.name: limit
limit.description: The maximum number of resources to return in the response. Used for pagination

x-idempotency-key.name: x-idempotency-key
x-idempotency-key.description: Unique id that is generated for each request and response. Used for tracking and to check for duplicate calls

x-interactions-id.name: x-interactions-id
x-interactions-id.description: Unique id for the interaction, used in all request and responses that are related
